ChangeRequest.name: Renaming the entity type `Potential retail exposure class financial asset instrument` to `Retail exposure class financial asset instrument`
ChangeRequest.comment:
<!-- See: documentation on [Issues in GitLab](https://gitlab.sofa.dev/sdd-bird-team/bird-logical-data-model/-/wikis/Issues-in-GitLab) -->
### Overview
Suggestion for improvement of name due to update of CRR.
### Contact person
dominik.lin-ully@oenb.at, Valentina.Murano@bancaditalia.it
### Description of change request
In the current model, we observe a distinction between “Potential Retail” and “Non-Retail”. The term “Potential”, originally introduced under CRR2, was used to represent cases where a counterparty might or might not meet the conditions of Article 123(1).
However, with the introduction of paragraph 4, this distinction has become less relevant. Moreover, the model currently does not provide a clear indication of when a counterparty should be definitively classified as “Retail”.
We propose to Rename the entity currently labeled:
* From: `Potential retail exposure class financial asset instrument` * To: `Retail exposure class financial asset instrument`
This change would ensure consistency with the field `Retail exposure according to CRR indicator` in the `Credit facility risk data` entity type, which classifies exposures as either:
* `Retail` * `Non-Retail`
Additionally, we recommend removing the word “Potential” from the entity’s description, if the renaming is approved.
### Summary of impacted LDM objects/attributes
* `Potential retail exposure class financial asset instrument`
### Forward Engineering considerations _[Other considerations]_
### Before closing checklist - [ ] Assignee for review - [ ] Assignee to close - [ ] Any other actions to be taken
